sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79992" key="*pataiki/wn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Πᾰταικίων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ωνος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, the name of a notorious thief, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0026.tlg003.perseus-grc1:189" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aeschin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.189</biblScope></bibl>, Diog.Cyn. ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.21f</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
